title: ranunculus elatior
intro: Ranunculus elatior, also known as tall buttercup, is a flowering plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat rheumatism, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus elatior are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce pain and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity and the risk of skin irritation.
